Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Moosewood Collective records
Moosewood Collective
6882
4.0 cubic feet. 4.0 cubic feet.
1973-2010. Correspondence, Manuscripts, Printed Materials, Publications Records of Moosewood, Inc., including menus from the restaurant and special events, work on cookbooks, files on publicity and public recognition, restaurant policies and management, photographs, and correspondence. Collection material in English 6957655
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
August 2010
EAD encoding:
Evan Earle, September 2010
Date modified:
Jude Corina, August 2012
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Moosewood Restaurant opened in Ithaca, NY in 1973. Moosewood, Inc. is a collectively owned business whose members share responsibilities and participate in the various jobs necessary to run what has grown from a very small natural foods restaurant to become a larger and more diversified company with a line of salad dressings, soups, and frozen main-dish entrees. With an emphasis on healthful natural foods cuisine, Moosewood has been acclaimed as a driving force in the world of creative vegetarian cooking.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records of Moosewood, Inc., including menus from the restaurant and special events, work on cookbooks, files on publicity and public recognition, restaurant policies and management, photographs, and correspondence.
Cite As:
Moosewood Collective records, #6882. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Vegetarian cooking. Employee ownership. Cooperative societies -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cookbooks -- United States.
